name: BTCPay Server Greenfield API Vocabulary
description: Terms, schemas, and concepts from the BTCPay Server Greenfield API v1

hasDefinedTerm.name: BaseUrl
hasDefinedTerm.description: Base URL of the BTCPay Server instance.

hasDefinedTerm.name: ValidationProblemDetails
hasDefinedTerm.description: An array of validation errors of the request

hasDefinedTerm.name: ProblemDetails
hasDefinedTerm.description: Description of an error happening during processing of the request

additionalProperty.name: code
additionalProperty.description: An error code describing the error

additionalProperty.name: message
additionalProperty.description: User friendly error message about the error

hasDefinedTerm.name: SpeedPolicy
hasDefinedTerm.description:
This is a risk mitigation parameter for the merchant to configure how they want to fulfill orders depending on the number of block confirmations for the transaction made by the consumer on the selected cryptocurrency.
`"HighSpeed"`: 0 confirmations (1 confirmation if RBF enabled in transaction)   
`"MediumSpeed"`: 1 confirmation   
`"LowMediumSpeed"`: 2 confirmations   
`"LowSpeed"`: 6 confirmations

hasDefinedTerm.name: TimeSpanSeconds
hasDefinedTerm.description: A span of times in seconds

hasDefinedTerm.name: TimeSpanDays
hasDefinedTerm.description: A span of times in days

hasDefinedTerm.name: TimeSpanMinutes
hasDefinedTerm.description: A span of times in minutes

hasDefinedTerm.name: PaymentMethodId
hasDefinedTerm.description:
Payment method IDs. Available payment method IDs for Bitcoin are:  
- `"BTC-CHAIN"`: Onchain   
-`"BTC-LN"`: Lightning   
- `"BTC-LNURL"`: LNURL

hasDefinedTerm.name: PayoutMethodId
hasDefinedTerm.description:
Payout method IDs. Available payment method IDs for Bitcoin are:  
- `"BTC-CHAIN"`: Onchain   
-`"BTC-LN"`: Lightning

hasDefinedTerm.name: HistogramData
hasDefinedTerm.description: Histogram data for wallet balances over time

additionalProperty.name: type
additionalProperty.description: The timespan of the histogram data

additionalProperty.name: balance
additionalProperty.description: The current wallet balance

additionalProperty.name: series
additionalProperty.description: An array of historic balances of the wallet

additionalProperty.name: labels
additionalProperty.description: An array of timestamps associated with the series data

additionalProperty.name: apiKey
additionalProperty.description: The API Key to use for API Key Authentication

additionalProperty.name: label
additionalProperty.description: The label given by the user to this API Key

additionalProperty.name: permissions
additionalProperty.description: The permissions associated to this API Key (can be scoped to a specific store)

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: Id of the app

additionalProperty.name: appName
additionalProperty.description: Name given to the app when it was created

additionalProperty.name: storeId
additionalProperty.description: Id of the store to which the app belongs

additionalProperty.name: created
additionalProperty.description: UNIX timestamp for when the app was created

additionalProperty.name: appType
additionalProperty.description: Type of the app which was created

additionalProperty.name: archived
additionalProperty.description: If true, the app does not appear in the apps list by default.

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: Unique ID of the item

additionalProperty.name: title
additionalProperty.description: The display name of the item

additionalProperty.name: description
additionalProperty.description: A description text for the item

additionalProperty.name: image
additionalProperty.description: An image URL for the item

additionalProperty.name: buyButtonText
additionalProperty.description: A custom text for the buy button for the item

additionalProperty.name: inventory
additionalProperty.description: The remaining stock the item

additionalProperty.name: disabled
additionalProperty.description: If true, the item does not appear in the list by default.

additionalProperty.name: salesCount
additionalProperty.description: Total sales in that period

additionalProperty.name: date
additionalProperty.description: UNIX timestamp of the beginning of that day

additionalProperty.name: label
additionalProperty.description: Short date as label

additionalProperty.name: salesCount
additionalProperty.description: Total sales on that day

additionalProperty.name: itemCode
additionalProperty.description: Item ID

additionalProperty.name: title
additionalProperty.description: Item Name

additionalProperty.name: salesCount
additionalProperty.description: Total sales of that item

additionalProperty.name: total
additionalProperty.description: The total amount of sales of that item

additionalProperty.name: totalFormatted
additionalProperty.description: The formatted total amount of sales of that item

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The id of the file

additionalProperty.name: userId
additionalProperty.description: The id of the user that uploaded the file

additionalProperty.name: uri
additionalProperty.description: The internal URI of the file

additionalProperty.name: url
additionalProperty.description: The full URL of the file

additionalProperty.name: originalName
additionalProperty.description: The original name of the file

additionalProperty.name: storageName
additionalProperty.description: The storage name of the file

additionalProperty.name: created
additionalProperty.description: The creation date of the file as a unix timestamp

additionalProperty.name: synchronized
additionalProperty.description: True if the instance is fully synchronized, according to NBXplorer

additionalProperty.name: status
additionalProperty.description: Mark an invoice as completed or invalid.

hasDefinedTerm.name: InvoiceAdditionalStatus
hasDefinedTerm.description: An additional status that describes why an invoice is in its current status.

additionalProperty.name: checkout
additionalProperty.description: Additional settings to customize the checkout flow

additionalProperty.name: receipt
additionalProperty.description: Additional settings to customize the public receipt

hasDefinedTerm.name: InvoiceMetadata
hasDefinedTerm.description: Additional information around the invoice that can be supplied. The mentioned properties are all optional and you can introduce any json format you wish. See [our documentation](https://docs.btcpayserver.org/Development/InvoiceMetadata/) for more information.

additionalProperty.name: paymentAmountThen
additionalProperty.description: The amount in crypto at the time the invoice was paid.

additionalProperty.name: paymentAmountNow
additionalProperty.description: The current amount in crypto.

additionalProperty.name: invoiceAmount
additionalProperty.description: The fiat amount at the rate when the refund will be sent.

additionalProperty.name: paymentCurrency
additionalProperty.description: The crypto currency of the invoice

additionalProperty.name: paymentCurrencyDivisibility
additionalProperty.description: The maximum divisibility supported by the crypto currency of the invoice

additionalProperty.name: invoiceCurrencyDivisibility
additionalProperty.description: The maximum divisibility supported by the fiat currency of the invoice

additionalProperty.name: invoiceCurrency
additionalProperty.description: The fiat currency of the invoice

additionalProperty.name: overpaidPaymentAmount
additionalProperty.description: The amount by which the invoice is overpaid

additionalProperty.name: paymentMethods
additionalProperty.description: A specific set of payment methods to use for this invoice (ie. BTC, BTC-LightningNetwork). By default, select all payment methods enabled in the store.

additionalProperty.name: defaultPaymentMethod
additionalProperty.description: Default payment type for the invoice (e.g., BTC, BTC-LightningNetwork). Default payment method set for the store is used if this parameter is not specified.

additionalProperty.name: lazyPaymentMethods
additionalProperty.description: If true, payment methods are enabled individually upon user interaction in the invoice. Default to store's settings'

additionalProperty.name: expirationMinutes
additionalProperty.description: The number of minutes after which an invoice becomes expired. Defaults to the store's settings. (The default store settings is 15)

additionalProperty.name: monitoringMinutes
additionalProperty.description: The number of minutes after an invoice expired after which we are still monitoring for incoming payments. Defaults to the store's settings. (The default store settings is 1440, 1 day)

additionalProperty.name: paymentTolerance
additionalProperty.description: A percentage determining whether to count the invoice as paid when the invoice is paid within the specified margin of error. Defaults to the store's settings. (The default store settings is 0)

additionalProperty.name: redirectURL
additionalProperty.description: When the customer has paid the invoice, the URL where the customer will be redirected when clicking on the `return to store` button. You can use placeholders `{InvoiceId}` or `{OrderId}` in the URL, BTCPay Server will replace those with this invoice `id` or `metadata.orderId` respectively.

additionalProperty.name: redirectAutomatically
additionalProperty.description: When the customer has paid the invoice, and a `redirectURL` is set, the checkout is redirected to `redirectURL` automatically if `redirectAutomatically` is true. Defaults to the store's settings. (The default store settings is false)

additionalProperty.name: defaultLanguage
additionalProperty.description: The language code (eg. en-US, en, fr-FR...) of the language presented to your customer in the checkout page. BTCPay Server tries to match the best language available. If null or not set, will fallback on the store's default language. You can see the list of language codes with [this operation](#operation/langCodes).

additionalProperty.name: enabled
additionalProperty.description: A public page will be accessible once the invoice is settled. If null or unspecified, it will fallback to the store's settings. (The default store settings is true)

additionalProperty.name: showQR
additionalProperty.description: Show the QR code of the receipt in the public receipt page. If null or unspecified, it will fallback to the store's settings. (The default store setting is true)

additionalProperty.name: showPayments
additionalProperty.description: Show the payment list in the public receipt page. If null or unspecified, it will fallback to the store's settings. (The default store setting is true)

additionalProperty.name: currency
additionalProperty.description: The currency of the payment method (e.g., "BTC" or "LTC")

additionalProperty.name: destination
additionalProperty.description: The destination the payment must be made to

additionalProperty.name: paymentLink
additionalProperty.description: A payment link that helps pay to the payment destination

additionalProperty.name: rate
additionalProperty.description: The rate between this payment method's currency and the invoice currency

additionalProperty.name: paymentMethodPaid
additionalProperty.description: The amount paid by this payment method

additionalProperty.name: totalPaid
additionalProperty.description: The total amount paid by all payment methods to the invoice, converted to this payment method's currency

additionalProperty.name: due
additionalProperty.description: The total amount left to be paid, converted to this payment method's currency (will be negative if overpaid)

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The invoice amount, converted to this payment method's currency

additionalProperty.name: paymentMethodFee
additionalProperty.description: The added merchant fee to pay for additional costs incurred by this payment method.

additionalProperty.name: payments
additionalProperty.description: Payments made with this payment method.

additionalProperty.name: activated
additionalProperty.description: If the payment method is activated (when lazy payments option is enabled

additionalProperty.name: additionalData
additionalProperty.description: Additional data provided by the payment method.

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: A unique identifier for this payment

additionalProperty.name: receivedDate
additionalProperty.description: The date the payment was recorded

additionalProperty.name: value
additionalProperty.description: The value of the payment

additionalProperty.name: fee
additionalProperty.description: The fee paid for the payment

additionalProperty.name: destination
additionalProperty.description: The destination the payment was made to

additionalProperty.name: name
additionalProperty.description: Name of the pull payment (Default: 'Refund' followed by the invoice id)

additionalProperty.name: description
additionalProperty.description: Description of the pull payment

additionalProperty.name: refundVariant
additionalProperty.description:
* `RateThen`: Refund the crypto currency price, at the rate the invoice got paid.
* `CurrentRate`: Refund the crypto currency price, at the current rate.
*`Fiat`: Refund the invoice currency, at the rate when the refund will be sent.
*`OverpaidAmount`: Refund the crypto currency amount that was overpaid.
*`Custom`: Specify the amount, currency, and rate of the refund. (see `customAmount` and `customCurrency`)

additionalProperty.name: subtractPercentage
additionalProperty.description: Optional percentage by which to reduce the refund, e.g. as processing charge or to compensate for the mining fee.

additionalProperty.name: customAmount
additionalProperty.description: The amount to refund if the `refundVariant` is `Custom`.

additionalProperty.name: customCurrency
additionalProperty.description: The currency to refund if the `refundVariant` is `Custom`

additionalProperty.name: nodeURI
additionalProperty.description: Node URI in the form `pubkey@endpoint[:port]`

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: Amount wrapped in a string, represented in a millisatoshi string. (1000 millisatoshi = 1 satoshi)

additionalProperty.name: description
additionalProperty.description: Description of the invoice in the BOLT11

additionalProperty.name: descriptionHashOnly
additionalProperty.description: If `descriptionHashOnly` is `true` (default is `false`), then the BOLT11 returned contains a hash of the `description`, rather than the `description`, itself. This allows for much longer descriptions, but they must be communicated via some other mechanism.

additionalProperty.name: expiry
additionalProperty.description: Expiration time in seconds

additionalProperty.name: privateRouteHints
additionalProperty.description: True if the invoice should include private route hints

additionalProperty.name: remoteNode
additionalProperty.description: The public key of the node (Node ID)

additionalProperty.name: isPublic
additionalProperty.description: Whether the node is public

additionalProperty.name: isActive
additionalProperty.description: Whether the node is online

additionalProperty.name: capacity
additionalProperty.description: The capacity of the channel in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: localBalance
additionalProperty.description: The local balance of the channel in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The payment's ID

additionalProperty.name: BOLT11
additionalProperty.description: The BOLT11 representation of the payment

additionalProperty.name: paymentHash
additionalProperty.description: The payment hash

additionalProperty.name: preimage
additionalProperty.description: The payment preimage (available when status is complete)

additionalProperty.name: createdAt
additionalProperty.description: The unix timestamp when the payment got created

additionalProperty.name: totalAmount
additionalProperty.description: The total amount (including fees) in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: feeAmount
additionalProperty.description: The total fees in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The invoice's ID

additionalProperty.name: BOLT11
additionalProperty.description: The BOLT11 representation of the invoice

additionalProperty.name: paidAt
additionalProperty.description: The unix timestamp when the invoice got paid

additionalProperty.name: expiresAt
additionalProperty.description: The unix timestamp when the invoice expires

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The amount of the invoice in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: amountReceived
additionalProperty.description: The amount received in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: paymentHash
additionalProperty.description: The payment hash

additionalProperty.name: preimage
additionalProperty.description: The payment preimage (available when status is complete)

additionalProperty.name: customRecords
additionalProperty.description: The custom TLV records attached to a keysend payment

additionalProperty.name: nodeURIs
additionalProperty.description: Node URIs to connect to this node in the form `pubkey@endpoint[:port]`

additionalProperty.name: blockHeight
additionalProperty.description: The block height of the lightning node

additionalProperty.name: alias
additionalProperty.description: The alias of the lightning node

additionalProperty.name: color
additionalProperty.description: The color attribute of the lightning node

additionalProperty.name: version
additionalProperty.description: The version name of the lightning node

additionalProperty.name: peersCount
additionalProperty.description: The number of peers

additionalProperty.name: activeChannelsCount
additionalProperty.description: The number of active channels

additionalProperty.name: inactiveChannelsCount
additionalProperty.description: The number of inactive channels

additionalProperty.name: pendingChannelsCount
additionalProperty.description: The number of pending channels

additionalProperty.name: onchain
additionalProperty.description: On-chain balance of the Lightning node

additionalProperty.name: offchain
additionalProperty.description: Off-chain balance of the Lightning node

additionalProperty.name: confirmed
additionalProperty.description: The confirmed amount in satoshi

additionalProperty.name: unconfirmed
additionalProperty.description: The unconfirmed amount in satoshi

additionalProperty.name: reserved
additionalProperty.description: The reserved amount in satoshi

additionalProperty.name: opening
additionalProperty.description: The amount of current channel openings in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: local
additionalProperty.description: The amount that is available on the local end of active channels in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: remote
additionalProperty.description: The amount that is available on the remote end of active channels in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: closing
additionalProperty.description: The amount of current channel closings in millisatoshi

additionalProperty.name: BOLT11
additionalProperty.description: The BOLT11 of the invoice to pay

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: Optional explicit payment amount in millisatoshi (if specified, it overrides the BOLT11 amount)

additionalProperty.name: maxFeePercent
additionalProperty.description: The fee limit expressed as a percentage of the payment amount

additionalProperty.name: maxFeeFlat
additionalProperty.description: The fee limit expressed as a fixed amount in satoshi

additionalProperty.name: sendTimeout
additionalProperty.description: The number of seconds after which the payment times out

additionalProperty.name: nodeURI
additionalProperty.description: Node URI in the form `pubkey@endpoint[:port]`

additionalProperty.name: channelAmount
additionalProperty.description: The amount to fund (in satoshi)

additionalProperty.name: feeRate
additionalProperty.description: The amount to fund (in satoshi per byte)

additionalProperty.name: seen
additionalProperty.description: Sets the notification as seen/unseen. If left null, sets it to the opposite value

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The id of the notification

additionalProperty.name: identifier
additionalProperty.description: The identifier of the notification

additionalProperty.name: type
additionalProperty.description: The type of the notification

additionalProperty.name: body
additionalProperty.description: The html body of the notifications

additionalProperty.name: storeId
additionalProperty.description: If related to a store, the store id of the notification

additionalProperty.name: link
additionalProperty.description: The link of the notification

additionalProperty.name: createdTime
additionalProperty.description: The creation time of the notification

additionalProperty.name: seen
additionalProperty.description: If the notification has been seen by the user

additionalProperty.name: disabled
additionalProperty.description: List of the notification type identifiers, which should be disabled. Can also be a single item 'all'.

additionalProperty.name: notifications
additionalProperty.description: The notification types

additionalProperty.name: identifier
additionalProperty.description: The identifier of the notification type

additionalProperty.name: name
additionalProperty.description: The description of the notification type

additionalProperty.name: enabled
additionalProperty.description: If the notification type is enabled

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The amount of the payment request

additionalProperty.name: title
additionalProperty.description: The title of the payment request

additionalProperty.name: currency
additionalProperty.description: The currency of the payment request. If empty, the store's default currency code will be used.

additionalProperty.name: email
additionalProperty.description: The email used in invoices generated by the payment request

additionalProperty.name: description
additionalProperty.description: The description of the payment request

additionalProperty.name: expiryDate
additionalProperty.description: The expiry date of the payment request

additionalProperty.name: referenceId
additionalProperty.description: An optional user-defined identifier for this payment request.

additionalProperty.name: allowCustomPaymentAmounts
additionalProperty.description: Whether to allow users to create invoices that partially pay the payment request

additionalProperty.name: formId
additionalProperty.description: Form ID to request customer data

additionalProperty.name: formResponse
additionalProperty.description: Form data response

additionalProperty.name: name
additionalProperty.description: unique identifier of the payout processor

additionalProperty.name: friendlyName
additionalProperty.description: Human name of the payout processor

additionalProperty.name: payoutMethods
additionalProperty.description: Supported, payment methods by this processor

additionalProperty.name: intervalSeconds
additionalProperty.description: How often should the processor run

additionalProperty.name: cancelPayoutAfterFailures
additionalProperty.description: How many failures should the processor tolerate before cancelling the payout

additionalProperty.name: processNewPayoutsInstantly
additionalProperty.description: Skip the interval when ane eligible payout has been approved (or created with pre-approval)

additionalProperty.name: intervalSeconds
additionalProperty.description: How often should the processor run

additionalProperty.name: cancelPayoutAfterFailures
additionalProperty.description: How many failures should the processor tolerate before cancelling the payout

additionalProperty.name: processNewPayoutsInstantly
additionalProperty.description: Skip the interval when ane eligible payout has been approved (or created with pre-approval)

additionalProperty.name: feeTargetBlock
additionalProperty.description: How many blocks should the fee rate calculation target to confirm in. Set to 1 if not provided

additionalProperty.name: intervalSeconds
additionalProperty.description: How often should the processor run

additionalProperty.name: threshold
additionalProperty.description: Only process payouts when this payout sum is reached.

additionalProperty.name: processNewPayoutsInstantly
additionalProperty.description: Skip the interval when ane eligible payout has been approved (or created with pre-approval)

additionalProperty.name: feeTargetBlock
additionalProperty.description: How many blocks should the fee rate calculation target to confirm in.

additionalProperty.name: intervalSeconds
additionalProperty.description: How often should the processor run

additionalProperty.name: threshold
additionalProperty.description: Only process payouts when this payout sum is reached.

additionalProperty.name: processNewPayoutsInstantly
additionalProperty.description: Skip the interval when ane eligible payout has been approved (or created with pre-approval)

additionalProperty.name: destination
additionalProperty.description: The destination of the payout (can be an address or a BIP21 url)

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The amount of the payout in the currency of the pull payment (eg. USD).

hasDefinedTerm.name: PayoutPaymentProof
hasDefinedTerm.description: Additional information around how the payout is being or has been paid out. The mentioned properties are all optional (except `proofType`) and you can introduce any json format you wish.

additionalProperty.name: proofType
additionalProperty.description: The type of payment proof it is.

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The id of the payout

additionalProperty.name: revision
additionalProperty.description: The revision number of the payout. This revision number is incremented when the payout amount or destination is modified before the approval.

additionalProperty.name: pullPaymentId
additionalProperty.description: The id of the pull payment this payout belongs to

additionalProperty.name: date
additionalProperty.description: The creation date of the payout as a unix timestamp

additionalProperty.name: destination
additionalProperty.description: The destination of the payout (can be an address or a BIP21 url)

additionalProperty.name: originalCurrency
additionalProperty.description: The currency before being converted into the payout's currency

additionalProperty.name: originalAmount
additionalProperty.description: The amount in originalCurrency before being converted into the payout's currency

additionalProperty.name: payoutCurrency
additionalProperty.description: The currency of the payout after conversion.

additionalProperty.name: payoutAmount
additionalProperty.description: The amount in payoutCurrency after conversion. (This property is set after the payout has been Approved)

additionalProperty.name: metadata
additionalProperty.description: Additional information around the payout that can be supplied. The mentioned properties are all optional and you can introduce any json format you wish.

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: Id of the pull payment

additionalProperty.name: name
additionalProperty.description: Name given to pull payment when it was created

additionalProperty.name: description
additionalProperty.description: Description given to pull payment when it was created

additionalProperty.name: currency
additionalProperty.description: The currency of the pull payment's amount

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The amount in the currency of this pull payment as a decimal string

additionalProperty.name: BOLT11Expiration
additionalProperty.description: If lightning is activated, do not accept BOLT11 invoices with expiration less than … days

additionalProperty.name: autoApproveClaims
additionalProperty.description: Any payouts created for this pull payment will skip the approval phase upon creation

additionalProperty.name: archived
additionalProperty.description: Whether this pull payment is archived

additionalProperty.name: viewLink
additionalProperty.description: The link to a page to claim payouts to this pull payment

additionalProperty.name: lnurlBech32
additionalProperty.description: Bech32 representation of LNURL

additionalProperty.name: lnurlUri
additionalProperty.description: URI representation of LNURL

additionalProperty.name: version
additionalProperty.description: BTCPay Server version

additionalProperty.name: onion
additionalProperty.description: The Tor hostname

additionalProperty.name: supportedPaymentMethods
additionalProperty.description: The payment methods this server supports

additionalProperty.name: fullySynched
additionalProperty.description: True if the instance is fully synchronized, according to NBXplorer

hasDefinedTerm.name: ApplicationServerInfoNodeStatusData
hasDefinedTerm.description: Detailed sync status of the internal full node

additionalProperty.name: headers
additionalProperty.description: The height of the chain of header of the internal full node

additionalProperty.name: blocks
additionalProperty.description: The height of the latest validated block of the internal full node

additionalProperty.name: verificationProgress
additionalProperty.description: The current synchronization progress

additionalProperty.name: chainHeight
additionalProperty.description: The height of the chain of header of the internal indexer

additionalProperty.name: syncHeight
additionalProperty.description: The height of the latest indexed block of the internal indexer

additionalProperty.name: available
additionalProperty.description: True if the full node and the indexer are fully synchronized

additionalProperty.name: from
additionalProperty.description: The sender email address

additionalProperty.name: server
additionalProperty.description: SMTP server host

additionalProperty.name: port
additionalProperty.description: SMTP server port

additionalProperty.name: login
additionalProperty.description: SMTP username

additionalProperty.name: disableCertificateCheck
additionalProperty.description: Disable TLS certificate security checks

additionalProperty.name: username
additionalProperty.description: The username of the lightning address

additionalProperty.name: currencyCode
additionalProperty.description: The currency to generate the invoices for this lightning address in. Leave null lto use the store default.

additionalProperty.name: min
additionalProperty.description: The minimum amount in sats this ln address allows

additionalProperty.name: max
additionalProperty.description: The maximum amount in sats this ln address allows

additionalProperty.name: invoiceMetadata
additionalProperty.description: The invoice metadata as JSON.

additionalProperty.name: enabled
additionalProperty.description: Whether the payment method is enabled, leave null or unspecified to not change current setting

additionalProperty.name: config
additionalProperty.description: The new payment method config, leave null or unspecified to not change current setting

additionalProperty.name: enabled
additionalProperty.description: Whether the payment method is enabled

additionalProperty.name: config
additionalProperty.description: Associated dynamic data based on payment method type.

additionalProperty.name: connectionString
additionalProperty.description: The lightning connection string. Set to 'Internal Node' to use the internal node. (See [this doc](https://github.com/btcpayserver/BTCPayServer.Lightning/blob/master/README.md#examples) for some example)

additionalProperty.name: useBech32Scheme
additionalProperty.description: Whether to use [LUD-01](https://github.com/fiatjaf/lnurl-rfc/blob/luds/01.md)'s bech32 format or to use [LUD-17](https://github.com/fiatjaf/lnurl-rfc/blob/luds/17.md) url formatting.

additionalProperty.name: lud12Enabled
additionalProperty.description: Allow comments to be passed on via lnurl.

additionalProperty.name: lud21Enabled
additionalProperty.description: Whether to include a [LUD-21](https://github.com/lnurl/luds/blob/luds/21.md) verify URL in LNURL-pay callback responses, enabling external services to verify payment settlement without authentication.

additionalProperty.name: spread
additionalProperty.description: A spread applies to the rate fetched in `%`. Must be `>= 0` or `<= 100`

additionalProperty.name: preferredSource
additionalProperty.description: When `isCustomScript` is `false`, uses this source in the default `effectiveScript`. When `isCustomScript` is `true`, this field is ignored (set to `null`). See `/misc/rate-sources` for available sources.

additionalProperty.name: isCustomScript
additionalProperty.description: Whether to use `preferredSource` with default script or a custom `effectiveScript`.

additionalProperty.name: effectiveScript
additionalProperty.description: When `isCustomScript` is `true`, this represent the custom script used to calculate a currency pair's exchange rate. Else, it represent the script generated by the default rules and `preferredSource`.

additionalProperty.name: currencyPair
additionalProperty.description: Currency pair in the format of `BTC_USD`

additionalProperty.name: errors
additionalProperty.description: Errors relating to this currency pair fetching based on your config

additionalProperty.name: rate
additionalProperty.description: the rate fetched based on the currency pair

additionalProperty.name: derivationScheme
additionalProperty.description: The derivation scheme

additionalProperty.name: label
additionalProperty.description: A label that will be shown in the UI

additionalProperty.name: accountKeyPath
additionalProperty.description: The wallet fingerprint followed by the keypath to derive the account key used for signing operation or creating PSBTs

additionalProperty.name: addresses
additionalProperty.description: a list of addresses generated by the derivation scheme

additionalProperty.name: keyPath
additionalProperty.description: The key path relative to the account key path.

additionalProperty.name: address
additionalProperty.description: The address generated at the key path

additionalProperty.name: label
additionalProperty.description: A label that will be shown in the UI

additionalProperty.name: passphrase
additionalProperty.description: A passphrase for the BIP39 mnemonic seed

additionalProperty.name: accountNumber
additionalProperty.description: The account to derive from the BIP39 mnemonic seed

additionalProperty.name: savePrivateKeys
additionalProperty.description: Whether to store the seed inside BTCPay Server to enable some additional services. IF `false` AND `existingMnemonic` IS NOT SPECIFIED, BE SURE TO SECURELY STORE THE SEED IN THE RESPONSE!

additionalProperty.name: wordList
additionalProperty.description: If `existingMnemonic` is not set, a mnemonic is generated using the specified wordList.

additionalProperty.name: wordCount
additionalProperty.description: If `existingMnemonic` is not set, a mnemonic is generated using the specified wordCount.

additionalProperty.name: scriptPubKeyType
additionalProperty.description: the type of wallet to generate

additionalProperty.name: balance
additionalProperty.description: The total current balance of the wallet

additionalProperty.name: unconfirmedBalance
additionalProperty.description: The current unconfirmed balance of the wallet

additionalProperty.name: confirmedBalance
additionalProperty.description: The current confirmed balance of the wallet

additionalProperty.name: feeRate
additionalProperty.description: The fee rate (sats per byte) based on the wallet's configured recommended block confirmation target

additionalProperty.name: address
additionalProperty.description: The bitcoin address

additionalProperty.name: keyPath
additionalProperty.description: the derivation path in relation to the HD account

additionalProperty.name: paymentLink
additionalProperty.description: a bip21 payment link

additionalProperty.name: type
additionalProperty.description: The type of label

additionalProperty.name: text
additionalProperty.description: Information about this label

additionalProperty.name: transactionHash
additionalProperty.description: The transaction id

additionalProperty.name: comment
additionalProperty.description: A comment linked to the transaction

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The amount the wallet balance changed with this transaction

additionalProperty.name: blockHash
additionalProperty.description: The hash of the block that confirmed this transaction. Null if still unconfirmed.

additionalProperty.name: blockHeight
additionalProperty.description: The height of the block that confirmed this transaction. Null if still unconfirmed.

additionalProperty.name: confirmations
additionalProperty.description: The number of confirmations for this transaction

additionalProperty.name: timestamp
additionalProperty.description: The time of the transaction

additionalProperty.name: status
additionalProperty.description: The status of this transaction

additionalProperty.name: labels
additionalProperty.description: Labels linked to this transaction

additionalProperty.name: comment
additionalProperty.description: A comment linked to this utxo

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: the value of this utxo

additionalProperty.name: link
additionalProperty.description: a link to the configured blockchain explorer to view the utxo

additionalProperty.name: outpoint
additionalProperty.description: outpoint of this utxo

additionalProperty.name: timestamp
additionalProperty.description: The time of the utxo

additionalProperty.name: keyPath
additionalProperty.description: the derivation path in relation to the HD account

additionalProperty.name: address
additionalProperty.description: The wallet address of this utxo

additionalProperty.name: confirmations
additionalProperty.description: The number of confirmations of this utxo

additionalProperty.name: labels
additionalProperty.description: Labels linked to this transaction

additionalProperty.name: destination
additionalProperty.description: A wallet address or a BIP21 payment link

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The amount to send. If `destination` is a BIP21 link, the amount must be the same or null.

additionalProperty.name: subtractFromAmount
additionalProperty.description: Whether to subtract the transaction fee from the provided amount. This makes the receiver receive less, or in other words: he or she pays the transaction fee. Also useful if you want to clear out your wallet. Must be false if `destination` is a BIP21 link

additionalProperty.name: destinations
additionalProperty.description: What and where to send money

additionalProperty.name: feerate
additionalProperty.description: Transaction fee.

additionalProperty.name: proceedWithPayjoin
additionalProperty.description: Whether to attempt to do a BIP78 payjoin if one of the destinations is a BIP21 with payjoin enabled

additionalProperty.name: proceedWithBroadcast
additionalProperty.description: Whether to broadcast the transaction after creating it or to simply return the transaction in hex format.

additionalProperty.name: signWithSeed
additionalProperty.description: If false, build an unsigned PSBT and skip server-side signing (use the CreateOnChainTransactionPSBT client helper).

additionalProperty.name: noChange
additionalProperty.description: Whether to send all the spent coins to the destinations (THIS CAN COST YOU SIGNIFICANT AMOUNTS OF MONEY, LEAVE FALSE UNLESS YOU KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING).

additionalProperty.name: rbf
additionalProperty.description: Whether to enable RBF for the transaction. Leave blank to have it random (beneficial to privacy)

additionalProperty.name: excludeUnconfirmed
additionalProperty.description: Whether to exclude unconfirmed UTXOs from the transaction.

additionalProperty.name: selectedInputs
additionalProperty.description: Restrict the creation of the transactions from the outpoints provided ONLY (coin selection)

additionalProperty.name: comment
additionalProperty.description: Transaction comment

additionalProperty.name: labels
additionalProperty.description: Transaction labels

additionalProperty.name: psbt
additionalProperty.description: Unsigned PSBT in base64 format

additionalProperty.name: transaction
additionalProperty.description: A finalized PSBT (base64) or raw transaction hex string

additionalProperty.name: type
additionalProperty.description: The type of wallet object

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The identifier of the wallet object (unique per type, per wallet)

additionalProperty.name: data
additionalProperty.description: The data of the link

additionalProperty.name: type
additionalProperty.description: The type of wallet object

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The identifier of the wallet object (unique per type, per wallet)

additionalProperty.name: linkData
additionalProperty.description: The data of the link

additionalProperty.name: objectData
additionalProperty.description: The data of the neighbour's node (`null` if there isn't any data or `includeNeighbourData` is `false`)

additionalProperty.name: links
additionalProperty.description: Links of this object

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The role's Id (Same as role if the role is created at server level, if the role is created at the store level the format is `STOREID::ROLE`)

additionalProperty.name: role
additionalProperty.description: The role's name

additionalProperty.name: permissions
additionalProperty.description: The permissions attached to this role

additionalProperty.name: isServerRole
additionalProperty.description: Whether this role is at the scope of the store or scope of the server

additionalProperty.name: currencyCode
additionalProperty.description: The currency

additionalProperty.name: amount
additionalProperty.description: The amount

additionalProperty.name: above
additionalProperty.description: If the criterion is for above or below the amount

additionalProperty.name: name
additionalProperty.description: The name of the store

additionalProperty.name: website
additionalProperty.description: The absolute url of the store

additionalProperty.name: supportUrl
additionalProperty.description: The support URI of the store, can contain the placeholders `{OrderId}` and `{InvoiceId}`. Can be any valid URI, such as a website, email, and nostr.

additionalProperty.name: logoUrl
additionalProperty.description: Absolute URL to a logo file or a reference to an uploaded file id with `fileid:ID`

additionalProperty.name: cssUrl
additionalProperty.description: Absolute URL to CSS file to customize the public/customer-facing pages of the store. (Invoice, Payment Request, Pull Payment, etc.) or a reference to an uploaded file id with `fileid:ID`

additionalProperty.name: paymentSoundUrl
additionalProperty.description: Absolute URL to a sound file or a reference to an uploaded file id with `fileid:ID`

additionalProperty.name: brandColor
additionalProperty.description: The brand color of the store in HEX format

additionalProperty.name: applyBrandColorToBackend
additionalProperty.description: Apply the brand color to the store's backend as well

additionalProperty.name: defaultCurrency
additionalProperty.description: The default currency of the store

additionalProperty.name: additionalTrackedRates
additionalProperty.description:
Additional rates to track.
The rates of those currencies, in addition to the default currency, will be recorded when a new invoice is created. The rates will then be accessible through reports.

additionalProperty.name: invoiceExpiration
additionalProperty.description: The time after which an invoice is considered expired if not paid. The value will be rounded down to a minute.

additionalProperty.name: refundBOLT11Expiration
additionalProperty.description: The minimum expiry of BOLT11 invoices accepted for refunds by default. (in days)

additionalProperty.name: displayExpirationTimer
additionalProperty.description: The time left that will trigger the countdown timer on the checkout page to be shown. The value will be rounded down to a minute.

additionalProperty.name: monitoringExpiration
additionalProperty.description: The time after which an invoice which has been paid but not confirmed will be considered invalid. The value will be rounded down to a minute.

additionalProperty.name: lightningDescriptionTemplate
additionalProperty.description: The BOLT11 description of the lightning invoice in the checkout. You can use placeholders '{StoreName}', '{ItemDescription}' and '{OrderId}'.

additionalProperty.name: paymentTolerance
additionalProperty.description: Consider an invoice fully paid, even if the payment is missing 'x' % of the full amount.

additionalProperty.name: archived
additionalProperty.description: If true, the store does not appear in the stores list by default.

additionalProperty.name: anyoneCanCreateInvoice
additionalProperty.description: If true, then no authentication is needed to create invoices on this store.

additionalProperty.name: receipt
additionalProperty.description: Additional settings to customize the public receipt

additionalProperty.name: lightningAmountInSatoshi
additionalProperty.description: If true, lightning payment methods show amount in satoshi in the checkout page.

additionalProperty.name: lightningPrivateRouteHints
additionalProperty.description: Should private route hints be included in the lightning payment of the checkout page.

additionalProperty.name: onChainWithLnInvoiceFallback
additionalProperty.description: Unify on-chain and lightning payment URL.

additionalProperty.name: redirectAutomatically
additionalProperty.description: After successful payment, should the checkout page redirect the user automatically to the redirect URL of the invoice?

additionalProperty.name: recommendedFeeBlockTarget
additionalProperty.description: The fee rate recommendation in the checkout page for the on-chain payment to be confirmed after 'x' blocks.

additionalProperty.name: defaultLang
additionalProperty.description: The default language to use in the checkout page. (The different translations available are listed [here](https://github.com/btcpayserver/btcpayserver/tree/master/BTCPayServer/wwwroot/locales)

additionalProperty.name: htmlTitle
additionalProperty.description: The HTML title of the checkout page (when you over the tab in your browser)

additionalProperty.name: payJoinEnabled
additionalProperty.description: If true, payjoin will be proposed in the checkout page if possible. ([More information](https://docs.btcpayserver.org/Payjoin/))

additionalProperty.name: autoDetectLanguage
additionalProperty.description: If true, the language on the checkout page will adapt to the language defined by the user's browser settings

additionalProperty.name: showPayInWalletButton
additionalProperty.description: If true, the "Pay in wallet" button will be shown on the checkout page (Checkout V2)

additionalProperty.name: showStoreHeader
additionalProperty.description: If true, the store header will be shown on the checkout page (Checkout V2)

additionalProperty.name: celebratePayment
additionalProperty.description: If true, payments on the checkout page will be celebrated with confetti (Checkout V2)

additionalProperty.name: playSoundOnPayment
additionalProperty.description: If true, sounds on the checkout page will be enabled (Checkout V2)

additionalProperty.name: lazyPaymentMethods
additionalProperty.description: If true, payment methods are enabled individually upon user interaction in the invoice

additionalProperty.name: paymentMethodCriteria
additionalProperty.description: The criteria required to activate specific payment methods.

hasDefinedTerm.name: NetworkFeeMode
hasDefinedTerm.description: Check whether network fee should be added to the invoice if on-chain payment is used. ([More information](https://docs.btcpayserver.org/FAQ/Stores/#add-network-fee-to-invoice-vary-with-mining-fees))

hasDefinedTerm.name: PlanCheckoutId
hasDefinedTerm.description: Unique identifier of the plan checkout session.

hasDefinedTerm.name: OnPayBehavior
hasDefinedTerm.description:
Defines how the system should behave when payment is processed during a plan checkout or migration.
* `SoftMigration`: Starts the plan only if payment is due. If no payment is due yet, the amount is added as credit instead of starting the plan.
* `HardMigration`: Starts the plan immediately, even if payment is not due. If the user already paid for unused time, the unused portion is refunded before starting the plan.

hasDefinedTerm.name: PlanCheckoutModel
hasDefinedTerm.description: Represents a checkout session for activating or purchasing a subscription plan.

additionalProperty.name: subscriber
additionalProperty.description: Subscriber associated with the checkout. (It can be null if the checkout is for a new subscriber, and the users didn't [proceed with the checkout](#operation/ProceedPlanCheckout))

additionalProperty.name: plan
additionalProperty.description: Plan being purchased or activated.

additionalProperty.name: successRedirectUrl
additionalProperty.description: URL to redirect the user after checkout success. (The `checkoutPlanId` query parameter will be added to the URL.)

additionalProperty.name: expiration
additionalProperty.description: Checkout expiration timestamp.

additionalProperty.name: redirectUrl
additionalProperty.description: URL where the user is redirected to proceed with payment.

additionalProperty.name: invoiceMetadata
additionalProperty.description: Custom metadata that will be attached to the invoice when it is created.

additionalProperty.name: metadata
additionalProperty.description: Custom metadata for the checkout.

additionalProperty.name: newSubscriber
additionalProperty.description: Indicates whether the checkout is for a new subscriber.

additionalProperty.name: isTrial
additionalProperty.description: Indicates if the checkout activates a trial.

additionalProperty.name: created
additionalProperty.description: Timestamp when checkout was created.

additionalProperty.name: planStarted
additionalProperty.description: Indicates if the plan has already been activated.

additionalProperty.name: newSubscriberMetadata
additionalProperty.description: Metadata for creating a new subscriber.

additionalProperty.name: refundAmount
additionalProperty.description: Refund amount applied during migration.

additionalProperty.name: creditedByInvoice
additionalProperty.description: Amount credited due to invoice settlement.

additionalProperty.name: onPayBehavior
additionalProperty.description: Defines how to apply payment behavior.

additionalProperty.name: isExpired
additionalProperty.description: Indicates whether the checkout session has expired.

additionalProperty.name: url
additionalProperty.description: Public URL for accessing the checkout session.

additionalProperty.name: creditPurchase
additionalProperty.description: Credit amount to purchase to top-up the account. Used when the user wants to top-up his credits. This will not automatically renew the plan.

hasDefinedTerm.name: CreatePlanCheckoutRequest
hasDefinedTerm.description: Request payload for initiating a plan checkout session.

additionalProperty.name: durationMinutes
additionalProperty.description: How long the checkout session is valid, in minutes.

additionalProperty.name: newSubscriberMetadata
additionalProperty.description: Metadata used when creating a new subscriber.

additionalProperty.name: invoiceMetadata
additionalProperty.description: Metadata attached to the created invoice.

additionalProperty.name: metadata
additionalProperty.description: Custom metadata for the checkout session.

additionalProperty.name: isTrial
additionalProperty.description: Indicates if the checkout starts a trial.

additionalProperty.name: creditPurchase
additionalProperty.description: Amount of credit to purchase.

additionalProperty.name: successRedirectLink
additionalProperty.description: URL to redirect the user after checkout success. (This default to offering's successRedirectLink, also, the `checkoutPlanId` query parameter will be added to the URL.)

additionalProperty.name: newSubscriberEmail
additionalProperty.description: Email address for creating a new subscriber. Keep `null` to let the user choose an email address in the checkout page.

hasDefinedTerm.name: SuspendSubscriberRequest
hasDefinedTerm.description: Request payload for suspending a subscriber.

additionalProperty.name: reason
additionalProperty.description: Reason for the suspension.

hasDefinedTerm.name: UpdateSubscriberDatesRequest
hasDefinedTerm.description: Request payload for updating subscriber dates. All fields are optional — omitting a field leaves the corresponding date unchanged.

additionalProperty.name: startDate
additionalProperty.description: New subscription start date as a Unix timestamp. Omit to leave the current start date unchanged.

additionalProperty.name: expirationDate
additionalProperty.description: New expiration date as a Unix timestamp. Updates `trialEnd` if the subscriber is in a trial, otherwise updates `periodEnd`. Grace period end and reminder date are recalculated automatically. Omit to leave the current expiration date unchanged.

hasDefinedTerm.name: CustomerSelector
hasDefinedTerm.description: Flexible identifier for selecting a customer. Supports: customer ID (e.g., `cust_abc123`), an email (e.g., `user@example.com`), or a key/value identity (e.g., `Email:user@example.com`).

additionalProperty.name: appName
additionalProperty.description: Display name of the related [application](#tag/Apps).

additionalProperty.name: successRedirectUrl
additionalProperty.description: The default URL to redirect to after a plan checkout is successful.

additionalProperty.name: metadata
additionalProperty.description: Custom metadata for the offering.

additionalProperty.name: features
additionalProperty.description: List of features included in this offering.

hasDefinedTerm.name: CustomerModel
hasDefinedTerm.description: Represents a customer associated with a store.

additionalProperty.name: externalId
additionalProperty.description: External system identifier for the customer.

additionalProperty.name: identities
additionalProperty.description: Identity attributes for matching and lookup (e.g., email, username).

additionalProperty.name: metadata
additionalProperty.description: Custom metadata associated with the customer.

hasDefinedTerm.name: SubscriberModel
hasDefinedTerm.description: Represents a subscriber of an offering.

additionalProperty.name: created
additionalProperty.description: Timestamp when the subscription was created.

additionalProperty.name: customer
additionalProperty.description: Customer associated with the subscription.

additionalProperty.name: offering
additionalProperty.description: Offering associated with the subscription.

additionalProperty.name: plan
additionalProperty.description: Current active plan of the subscriber.

additionalProperty.name: periodEnd
additionalProperty.description: End of the current billing period.

additionalProperty.name: trialEnd
additionalProperty.description: End of the subscriber's trial period.

additionalProperty.name: gracePeriodEnd

additionalProperty.name: isActive
additionalProperty.description: Indicates if the subscription is active. (Phase is not `Expired`, and not suspended)

additionalProperty.name: isSuspended
additionalProperty.description: Indicates if the subscription is suspended.

additionalProperty.name: suspensionReason
additionalProperty.description: Reason for suspension, if applicable.

additionalProperty.name: autoRenew
additionalProperty.description: Indicates if the subscription renews automatically.

additionalProperty.name: metadata
additionalProperty.description: Custom metadata for the subscription.

additionalProperty.name: processingInvoiceId
additionalProperty.description: ID of the invoice being processed.

additionalProperty.name: nextPlan
additionalProperty.description: Plan scheduled for next billing cycle.

additionalProperty.name: scheduledPlan
additionalProperty.description: Plan scheduled to activate at the end of the current billing period.

additionalProperty.name: scheduledPlanActivatesAt
additionalProperty.description: Timestamp when the scheduled plan change will activate.

hasDefinedTerm.name: UpdateCreditRequest
hasDefinedTerm.description: Request payload for updating subscriber credit.

additionalProperty.name: credit
additionalProperty.description: Amount of credit to add as a numeric string.

additionalProperty.name: charge
additionalProperty.description: Amount to deduct as a numeric string.

additionalProperty.name: description
additionalProperty.description: Short description explaining the credit change.

additionalProperty.name: allowOverdraft
additionalProperty.description: Indicates if the credit balance is allowed to go negative.

hasDefinedTerm.name: CreditModel
hasDefinedTerm.description: Represents a subscriber's credit balance in a specific currency.

additionalProperty.name: currency
additionalProperty.description: Currency code of the credit balance.

additionalProperty.name: value

hasDefinedTerm.name: CreatePlanRequest
hasDefinedTerm.description: Request payload for creating a new offering plan.

additionalProperty.name: gracePeriodDays

additionalProperty.name: optimisticActivation

hasDefinedTerm.name: WebhookSubscriberEvent
hasDefinedTerm.description: Callback sent for subscription events tied to a subscriber.

hasDefinedTerm.name: WebhookSubscriberDisabledReason
hasDefinedTerm.description: Reason why the subscriber was disabled.

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The id of the user

additionalProperty.name: email
additionalProperty.description: The email of the user

additionalProperty.name: name
additionalProperty.description: The name of the user

additionalProperty.name: imageUrl
additionalProperty.description: The profile picture URL of the user

additionalProperty.name: invitationUrl
additionalProperty.description: The pending invitation URL of the user

additionalProperty.name: emailConfirmed
additionalProperty.description: True if the email has been confirmed by the user

additionalProperty.name: requiresEmailConfirmation
additionalProperty.description: True if the email requires confirmation to log in

additionalProperty.name: approved
additionalProperty.description: True if an admin has approved the user

additionalProperty.name: requiresApproval
additionalProperty.description: True if the instance requires approval to log in

additionalProperty.name: storeQuota
additionalProperty.description: Per-user override for the max number of stores this user can create. Null means the server default applies

additionalProperty.name: created
additionalProperty.description: The creation date of the user as a unix timestamp. Null if created before v1.0.5.6

additionalProperty.name: disabled
additionalProperty.description: True if an admin has disabled the user

additionalProperty.name: roles
additionalProperty.description: The roles of the user

additionalProperty.name: locked
additionalProperty.description: Whether to lock or unlock the user

additionalProperty.name: approved
additionalProperty.description: Whether to approve or unapprove the user

additionalProperty.name: id
additionalProperty.description: The id of the delivery

additionalProperty.name: timestamp
additionalProperty.description: Timestamp of when the delivery should have been broadcasted

additionalProperty.name: deliveryTime
additionalProperty.description: Timestamp of when the delivery has actually been broadcasted. A delay with `timestamp` means your service either failed to process earlier deliveries or is taking too long to respond.

additionalProperty.name: httpCode
additionalProperty.description: HTTP code received by the remote service, if any.

additionalProperty.name: errorMessage
additionalProperty.description: User friendly error message, if any.

additionalProperty.name: status
additionalProperty.description: Whether the delivery failed or not (possible values are: `Failed`, `HttpError`, `HttpSuccess`)

additionalProperty.name: enabled
additionalProperty.description: Whether this webhook is enabled or not

additionalProperty.name: automaticRedelivery
additionalProperty.description: If true, BTCPay Server will retry to redeliver any failed delivery after 10 seconds, 1 minutes and up to 6 times after 10 minutes.

additionalProperty.name: url
additionalProperty.description: The endpoint where BTCPay Server will make the POST request with the webhook body

additionalProperty.name: authorizedEvents
additionalProperty.description: Which event should be received by this endpoint

additionalProperty.name: deliveryId
additionalProperty.description: The delivery id of the webhook

additionalProperty.name: webhookId
additionalProperty.description: The id of the webhook

additionalProperty.name: originalDeliveryId
additionalProperty.description: If this delivery is a redelivery, the is the delivery id of the original delivery.

additionalProperty.name: isRedelivery
additionalProperty.description: True if this delivery is a redelivery

additionalProperty.name: type
additionalProperty.description: The type of this event, current available are `InvoiceCreated`, `InvoiceReceivedPayment`, `InvoiceProcessing`, `InvoiceExpired`, `InvoiceSettled`, `InvoiceInvalid`, `InvoicePaymentSettled`, `PaymentRequestCreated`, `PaymentRequestUpdated`, `PaymentRequestArchived`, `PaymentRequestStatusChanged`, `PayoutCreated`, `PayoutApproved`, `PayoutUpdated`, `SubscriberCreated`, `SubscriberCredited`, `SubscriberCharged`, `SubscriberActivated`, `SubscriberPhaseChanged`, `SubscriberDisabled`, `PaymentReminder`, `PlanStarted`, and `SubscriberNeedUpgrade`.

additionalProperty.name: timestamp
additionalProperty.description: The timestamp when this delivery has been created
